name: create_tweet
description: Post a new tweet to the authenticated user's timeline. You can include plain text, reply to an existing tweet, quote-tweet another tweet, or create a poll. The text field supports up to 280 characters. Returns the created tweet's ID and text.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text content of the tweet. Maximum 280 characters.

parameters.name: reply.in_reply_to_tweet_id
parameters.description: The ID of the tweet this is a reply to. Nest inside a 'reply' object in the request body.

parameters.name: quote_tweet_id
parameters.description: The ID of the tweet to quote. Creates a quote tweet.

parameters.name: poll.options
parameters.description: Array of poll option strings (2-4 options). Nest inside a 'poll' object along with 'duration_minutes'.

parameters.name: poll.duration_minutes
parameters.description: Duration of the poll in minutes (5-10080). Required if poll.options is provided.

body.text: Hello world! This is my first tweet from the API.

data.text: Hello world! This is my first tweet from the API.
